arts.ttl: BREAKING: Ruben Amorim names first Man Utd XI with three changes made for Ipswich
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim takes charge of Manchester United for the first time in the Premier League as the Red Devils make the trip to Portman Road to take on Ipswich Town and former coach Kieran McKenna

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim names Man United team to face Ipswich
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has named his first Manchester United team as the Red Devils take on Ipswich Town in the Premier League. Amorim takes charge of Manchester United for the first time at Portman Road on Sunday, having begun his reign in charge during the international break. Rasmus Hojlund drops to the bench, as does […] The post Ruben Amorim names Man United team to face Ipswich first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Team News: Who makes Amorim's first Man United XI? Will the Red Devils play 3-4-3?
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim names his first Red Devils XI, with the 20-time English champions in action against Ipswich Town at Portman Road.

arts.ttl: Ipswich Town v Manchester United: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Premier League updates from the 4.30pm GMT kick-off Live scoreboard | Sign up for Football Daily | Email Taha Right then, United fans, are you feeling it again? You know it, that dangerous thing that pops up every couple of years with the appointment of a new manager. Hope. This guy’s the real deal, you say and genuinely believe. Before you know it you’re 3-0 down at Brighton, the camera pans to Ferguson in the stands and the veterans are raging once again on The Overlap, inviting one of their old mates back to talk about the good times. Will Ruben Amorim change the story and somehow avoid all his hair growing grey by January? The answer begins at Portman Road against an Ipswich side that finally has a win on the board after beating Spurs before the international break. Kieran McKenna, linked with the United job in the summer, could well play the villain. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Joshua Zirkzee offered nightmare Man United escape route ahead of Ruben Amorim call
arts.sum: Joshua Zirkzee has struggled to adapt to life at Manchester United following his summer move from Bologna, having failed to score since the opening day of the season

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim's first Man United squad confirmed as exciting 16-year-old included vs Ipswich
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim is managing his first Manchester United game today and his squad for the Premier League clash with Ipswich Town has been confirmed.

arts.ttl: Ipswich vs Man United - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as Ruben Amorim takes charge for the first time after joining from Sporting Lisbon
arts.sum: Follow Mal Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates as Ruben Amorim takes charge of Manchester United when they take on Ipswich Town at Portman Road.

arts.ttl: Man Utd 'firmly' wanted Amorim favourite even before his appointment
arts.sum: The Sporting CP youngster has enjoyed a meteoric rise this season, becoming a regular in the side of the Portuguese champions under Amorim prior to his move to Man Utd . Manchester United were keen on Geovany Quenda even before Ruben Amorim's appointment, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Evans and Rashford start for Man Utd vs Ipswich LIVE!
arts.sum: Amorim was also asked if he has met legendary United boss Sir Alex Ferguson - the last manager who delivered the Premier League title to Old Trafford in 2013. New Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim has revealed he can be "The Smiling One" when players are working well - but he can be ruthless when they are not.

arts.ttl: Inter end Manchester City reign as best team in the world
arts.sum: Inter have overtaken Manchester City to become the best club team in the world right...
